form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[访问编码] scheduleId[维护计划ID] equipmentId[设备ID] visitDate[访问日期] status[状态] visitType[维护类型] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] ==========>execution[执行信息]====== assignedTo[指派人] completedBy[完成人] completedAt[完成时间] startTime[开始时间] endTime[结束时间] totalMinutes[总分钟数] result[执行结果] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[访问编码] scheduleId[维护计划ID] equipmentId[设备ID] visitDate[访问日期] status[状态] visitType[维护类型] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] ==========>execution[执行信息]====== assignedTo[指派人] completedBy[完成人] completedAt[完成时间] startTime[开始时间] endTime[结束时间] totalMinutes[总分钟数] result[执行结果] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[访问编码] status[状态] equipmentId[设备ID] visitDate[访问日期]
